---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

<!--
This page is for short, evidence-backed project case studies.
Think “what I worked on and what came out of it”, not full lab notebooks 🙂

To add more projects: copy one of the card blocks below and paste it inside the .grid div.
Each card is a ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6} ::: {.card} ... ::: ::: block.
-->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
## Project title

<!-- PROMPT:
1–2 sentences. What was the problem or question you were addressing?
-->
**Problem:** What needed solving, understanding, or building?

<!-- PROMPT:
Be explicit about *your* contribution.
-->
**My role:** What you were responsible for (analysis, methods, coordination, etc.).

<!-- PROMPT:
High level is fine.
Focus on approach, tools, or concepts — not implementation detail.
-->
**Approach:** How you went about it (methods, data, tools).

<!-- PROMPT:
Evidence matters more than prose.
Link to anything public or shareable.
-->
**Evidence:**
- Repo: …
- Report / preprint: …
- Paper / poster: …
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
## Project title

**Problem:** …  
**My role:** …  
**Approach:** …  

**Evidence:**
- Repo: …
- Output: …
:::
:::
:::
